description: Recto: the endings of several lines from an Arabic letter. Verso: fragmentary Judaeo-Arabic phrases that seem very Islamic: "al-mujahidin... wa-li-Ṣafiyya ukhtuhu... rasul allah wa-ashhadu... shahdan wa-ashhadu... rasul allah... rasul allah...." It also lists several names that are difficult to decipher.
description_he: צד א: קצות שורות ממכתב ערבי. צד ב: ביטויים ביהודית-ערבית הנשמעים מאוד אסלאמיים, ורשימת שמות.
